scripts.docker:deploy:be: npm run docker:build:be && npm run docker:tag:be && npm run docker:push:be
scripts.docker:run:be: docker rm -f wdp-backend || true && docker run -d --name wdp-backend --restart unless-stopped -p 8386:8386 --env-file .env.production lthung0412/wdp-be:latest
scripts.docker:refresh:be: npm run docker:pull:be && npm run docker:run:be
scripts.docker:deploy:fe: npm run docker:build:fe && npm run docker:push:fe
scripts.docker:deploy:all: npm run docker:deploy:be && npm run docker:deploy:fe
